targets.expr: sum by (pod) (changes(kube_pod_container_status_ready{namespace="$namespace", container="worker-sidecar"}[5m]))
container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", container="worker"} / 1024 / 1024 / 1024
DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{namespace="$namespace"} / 1024
DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{namespace="$namespace"} / 1024
sum(rate(sie_worker_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker", outcome="error"}[5m])) by (producer_instance)
DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP{namespace="$namespace"}

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(sie_worker_model_load_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[5m])) by (le, producer_instance, model, stage, outcome))
sie_worker_model_loaded{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}
rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="$namespace", container="worker"}[5m])

panels.title: Sidecar Config, NATS, Payload, IPC, and Drain Health
panels.description: Config convergence, NATS/payload outcomes, delivery attempts, IPC acquisition, payload size, and bounded shutdown-drain signals from the realtime sidecar.

targets.expr: sum by (source, operation, outcome, lane) (rate(sie_worker_config_applies_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"}[5m]))
max by (source, lane) (sie_worker_config_epoch{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"})
max by (source, lane) (sie_worker_config_degraded_ratio{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"})
sum by (operation, outcome, reason, lane) (rate(sie_worker_nats_operations_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"}[5m]))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, redelivered, lane) (rate(sie_worker_nats_delivery_attempts_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"}[5m])))
sum by (outcome, reason, lane) (rate(sie_worker_payload_fetches_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"}[5m]))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, outcome, reason, lane) (rate(sie_worker_payload_fetch_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, outcome, reason, lane) (rate(sie_worker_payload_size_bytes_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, transport, outcome, lane) (rate(sie_worker_ipc_acquire_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, outcome, lane) (rate(sie_worker_shutdown_drain_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"}[5m])))

panels.title: Sidecar Capacity and Pressure State
panels.description: Current GPU slots, pending items/cost, in-flight batches, saturation, and IPC capacity/in-flight state by lane.

targets.expr: max by (state, lane) (sie_worker_gpu_slots{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"})
max by (lane) (sie_worker_pending_items{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"})
max by (lane) (sie_worker_pending_cost{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"})
max by (lane) (sie_worker_inflight_batches{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"})
max by (lane) (sie_worker_saturated_ratio{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"})
max by (transport, lane) (sie_worker_ipc_capacity{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"})
max by (transport, lane) (sie_worker_ipc_inflight{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"})

panels.title: Python Batch Shape and Rust Forward Runtime
panels.description: Python pending/batch/subgroup distributions and Rust forward concurrency, limit, total/stage duration, and permit wait.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, operation, lane) (rate(sie_worker_queue_pending_at_dispatch_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, operation, backend, lane) (rate(sie_worker_runtime_batch_size_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, operation, backend, lane) (rate(sie_worker_runtime_batch_subgroups_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, operation, backend, lane) (rate(sie_worker_runtime_subgroup_size_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, model, profile, stage, outcome) (rate(sie_worker_runtime_forward_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, model, profile, output_path) (rate(sie_worker_runtime_forward_permit_wait_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[5m])))
max by (model, profile, state) (sie_worker_runtime_forward_concurrent{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"})
max by (model, profile) (sie_worker_runtime_forward_limit{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"})

panels.title: Model Memory, Evictions, and Adaptive Scheduler
panels.description: Model-memory/eviction signals and adaptive scheduler cost, wait, p50 target/observation, and starvation resets across the single conditional owner.

targets.expr: max by (model, profile, backend, lane) (sie_worker_model_memory_bytes{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"})
sum by (model, profile, backend, lane, reason) (rate(sie_worker_model_evictions_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[5m]))
max by (model, profile, lane) (sie_worker_scheduler_adaptive_cost{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service=~"sie-worker|sie-worker-sidecar"})
max by (model, profile, lane) (sie_worker_scheduler_adaptive_wait_seconds{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service=~"sie-worker|sie-worker-sidecar"})
max by (model, profile, lane, kind) (sie_worker_scheduler_adaptive_p50_seconds{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service=~"sie-worker|sie-worker-sidecar"})

sum by (model, profile, lane) (rate(sie_worker_scheduler_starvation_resets_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service=~"sie-worker|sie-worker-sidecar"}[5m]))

panels.title: Sidecar Result-Chunk Transport Health
panels.description: Terminal result-transport attempts, published chunk rate/size, negotiated IPC transfer outcomes, reconstructed size/chunk count, and current reservation state by bounded lane.

targets.expr: sum by (mode, outcome, lane) (rate(sie_worker_result_transport_attempts_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"}[5m]))
sum by (lane) (rate(sie_worker_result_chunks_published_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"}[5m]))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, lane) (rate(sie_worker_result_chunk_size_bytes_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"}[5m])))
sum by (outcome, lane) (rate(sie_worker_ipc_response_chunks_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"}[5m]))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, lane) (rate(sie_worker_ipc_response_reconstructed_size_bytes_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, lane) (rate(sie_worker_ipc_response_chunk_count_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"}[5m])))
sum by (lane) (sie_worker_ipc_response_chunk_reserved_bytes{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"})
